entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: If a கார்டு keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic வழிமுறை to uncover the தவறான புரிதல், கணிதம் Step பயிற்சியாளர் for procedural gaps, or the AI கற்றல் தூண்டல் நூலகம் to find a better study தூண்டல்.

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: If the பதில் is yes, AI உதவிed you study. If the பதில் is no, the next நடவடிக்கை is not more reading. It is active பயிற்சி. Open கற்க எதுவும், Socratic வழிமுறை, or the AI கற்றல் தூண்டல் நூலகம் and turn the தலைப்பு into a task you have to attempt.

entries.source: If the learner gives a vague request, suggest 3 to 5 people with reasons, best modes, controversy level, and evidence quality. If a person is named but the time slice is missing, offer meaningful versions of that person before any in-character dialogue. Once person and time slice are clear, build the room and dossier before the person speaks.
entries.value: If the கற்றுக்கொள்ளer gives a vague request, suggest 3 to 5 people with reasons, best முறைகள், controversy level, and ஆதாரம் quality. If a person is named but the time slice is missing, offer meaningful versions of that person before any in-character dialogue. Once person and time slice are clear, build the room and dossier before the person speaks.

entries.source: If the learner's intent is vague, resolve it into 3 concrete arrival options and stop for a choice. If the passport is already clear, open the world with modular cards rather than a paragraph.
entries.value: If the கற்றுக்கொள்ளer's intent is vague, resolve it into 3 concrete arrival options and stop for a choice. If the passport is already clear, open the world with modular கார்டுகள் rather than a பத்தி.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: எனில் the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one எடுத்துக்காட்டு, one தவறான புரிதல், one சரிபார்க்க கேள்வி, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: If the work is வீட்டுப்பாடம், start in வீட்டுப்பாடம் பயிற்சியாளர். If it is math, use கணிதம் Step பயிற்சியாளர் and ask it to சரிபார்க்க one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic வழிமுறை and பதில் the கேள்விகள் before asking for a சுருக்கம்.

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: எனில் you ஒட்ட a வீட்டுப்பாடம் கேள்வி and copy the final பதில், you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a குறிப்பு, explain your thinking, compare your பதில், and try a similar problem, AI becomes a படிப்பு கூட்டாளர் instead of a shortcut.

entries.value: உங்கள் குரலை நிலைநிறுத்தி, திட்டமிடல், திருத்தம், அமைப்பு மற்றும் கருத்துக்களைப் பயன்படுத்தி எழுதுதலை மேம்படுத்துங்கள்.

entries.source: Improve writing without losing your voice
entries.value: உங்கள் குரலை இழக்காமல் எழுதுதலை மேம்படுத்துங்கள்

entries.source: In a world where AI is rapidly advancing, it will only be human consciousness and creativity that can survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."
entries.value: இதில் a world where AI is rapidly advancing, it will only be மனித விழிப்புணர்வு and படைப்பாற்றல் that can survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."

entries.source: In this guide
entries.value: இந்த வழிகாட்டியில்

entries.source: Include the question, what you already tried, where you got stuck, and whether you want a hint, a step check, or feedback.
entries.value: கேள்வி, நீங்கள் ஏற்கனவே முயன்றது, எங்கு சிக்கினீர்கள், குறிப்பு வேண்டுமா, படியைச் சரிபார்க்க வேண்டுமா, பின்னூட்டம் வேண்டுமா என்பதையும் சேருங்கள்.

entries.source: Include what you know, what you tried, what level you need, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: உங்களுக்கு தெரிந்தது, முயன்றது, தேவைப்படும் நிலை, விரும்பும் உதவி வகை ஆகியவற்றைச் சேர்க்கவும்.
